mapper.insert: /* tms-master-store-sql-oracle.xml - insertTTMstStore */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_STORE ( STORE_KEY, STORE_NAME, FCTYPE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, OWNER_NAME, REGNO, CLOSEDATE, TEL1, TEL2, SV_NM, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY, ZIPCODE, ADDRID, CLOSDATE, STORE_TYPE, CUST_TYPE, CUST_TYPE_DETAIL ) VALUES ( #{storeKey}, #{storeName}, '0', #{address1}, #{address2}, #{ownerName}, #{regno}, #{closedate}, #{tel1}, #{tel2}, #{scNm}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{zipcode}, #{addrid}, SUBSTR(#{closdate}, 0, 14), '0', #{custType}, #{custTypeDetail} ) ON CONFLICT (STORE_KEY) DO UPDATE SET STORE_NAME = EXCLUDED.STORE_NAME, FCTYPE = EXCLUDED.FCTYPE, ADDRESS1 = EXCLUDED.ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2 = EXCLUDED.ADDRESS2, OWNER_NAME = EXCLUDED.OWNER_NAME, REGNO = EXCLUDED.REGNO, CLOSEDATE = EXCLUDED.CLOSEDATE, TEL1 = EXCLUDED.TEL1, TEL2 = EXCLUDED.TEL2, SV_NM = EXCLUDED.SV_NM, UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY, ZIPCODE = EXCLUDED.ZIPCODE, ADDRID = EXCLUDED.ADDRID, CLOSDATE = EXCLUDED.CLOSDATE, STORE_TYPE = EXCLUDED.STORE_TYPE, CUST_TYPE = EXCLUDED.CUST_TYPE, CUST_TYPE_DETAIL = EXCLUDED.CUST_TYPE_DETAIL

/* tms-master-store-sql-oracle.xml - insertTTMstStorexct */ INSERT INTO TT_MST_STOREXCT ( UPDATEURKEY, UPDATEDATE, INSERTURKEY, INSERTDATE, CTKEY, STORE_KEY, DCKEY, ICGRKEY ) VALUES ( #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{surkey}, #{sysdate}, #{ctkey}, #{storeKey}, #{dckey}, '02' ) ON CONFLICT (CTKEY, STORE_KEY) DO UPDATE SET UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY, UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE, ICGRKEY = EXCLUDED.ICGRKEY
